name: @ia2-dev/browser-extension
description: Chrome, Firefox, and Safari packaging for RDF/HTML rendering, automatic HARE viewing, and the IA² HTML/RDF Navigator.

scripts.check: node --check src/auto.js && node --check src/background.js && node --check src/collector.js && node --check src/content.js && node --check src/mount.js && node --check src/status.js && node --check scripts/build.mjs && node --check scripts/package.mjs && node --check scripts/package-safari.mjs && node --check scripts/store-assets.mjs
